channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hurricanes edge Canadiens 3–2 in overtime to even Eastern Conference Final series
item.description: Game 2 of the Eastern Conference Final between the Montreal Canadiens and the Carolina Hurricanes was a tightly contested, low-event matchup that ultimately required overtime to decide a winner. After...

item.title: Tinubu Secures APC Presidential Ticket for 2027 After Landslide Primary Win
item.description: President Bola Tinubu don emerge as the presidential candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) for the 2027 general election after a very dominant performance in the party primary held in Abuja...

item.title: Tiger Woods reportedly returns to Switzerland rehab facility amid Vanessa Trump's cancer diagnosis
item.description: Tiger Woods has reportedly travelled back to Switzerland, where he has been undergoing rehabilitation treatment following his March DUI-related car crash and arrest in Florida. According to reports ci...

item.title: Legal experts and judges warn of severe strain on U.S. rule of law amid concerns over presidential power
item.description: A Los Angeles Times column reports on growing concerns among legal experts, including federal judges, attorneys, and law professors, about the state of the U.S. rule of law during President Donald Tru...

item.title: Karnataka Cyber Police Arrest Six in ₹24 Crore Digital Arrest Fraud Targeting Retired Woman
item.description: In a major cybercrime case described as Karnataka’s biggest “digital arrest” fraud so far, the Karnataka State Cyber Command arrested six persons accused of cheating an elderly Bengaluru woman of near...

item.title: SANDF Surgeon General honours 20 years of service for military healthcare workers in Cape Town
item.description: Long-serving members of the South African Military Health Service (SAMHS) were formally recognised in Cape Town during a medal parade held at the Wynberg Military Sports Ground on 22 May 2026. The eve...

item.title: Orbit College relegated after final-day defeat to Orlando Pirates
item.description: Orbit College have been relegated from the Betway Premiership following a 2-0 defeat to Orlando Pirates on the final day of the season, a result that confirmed their drop after Magesi FC secured a cru...

item.title: Ynez Veneracion Shares Past Personal Struggles on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: Nagbahagi si Ynez Veneracion ng ilang mabibigat na karanasan mula sa kanyang nakaraan sa kanyang paglabas sa programang “Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal.” Sa nasabing episode, binalikan ng aktres ang mga pe...

item.title: US signals progress in Iran negotiations as Trump insists no rushed agreement will be made
item.description: New information has emerged regarding ongoing negotiations between the United States and Iran over a potential peace agreement, with senior US officials suggesting that “significant progress” has been...

item.title: West Bengal directs creation of holding centres for undocumented migrants pending deportation process
item.description: The West Bengal government has issued an order directing the establishment of ‘holding centres’ across districts for apprehended foreigners, including alleged undocumented migrants from Bangladesh and...

item.title: TikToker shares alleged WhatsApp chats involving Dr Ofweneke amid past relationship claims
item.description: A Kenyan TikToker, Joan Mwaniki, has gone viral after making public claims about her alleged past romantic relationship with media personality Sande Bush, popularly known as Dr Ofweneke. According to ...

item.title: Albay bettor wins ₱25 million jackpot in PCSO Superlotto 6/49 draw
item.description: A lucky bettor from Albay has won the ₱25 million jackpot prize in the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) Superlotto 6/49 draw held on Sunday, May 24, 2026. The winning ticket matched the co...

item.title: FRSC advises alternative routes amid Sallah congestion on Abuja–Kaduna highway
item.description: The Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) has issued a travel advisory to motorists using the Abuja–Kaduna Highway, urging them to be patient and strictly follow traffic rules due to heavy congestion linke...

item.title: Seven Gaza flotilla activists return to UK after deportation from Israel amid detention allegations
item.description: Seven activists who had been detained after taking part in a Gaza-bound aid flotilla have returned to the United Kingdom following their deportation from Israel. The group were among more than 422 par...

item.title: Survey finds authenticity and spontaneity are key to how fans connect with music artists
item.description: A new international study has found that authenticity is the defining quality music fans look for when connecting with artists. According to research conducted among 9,000 music fans across nine count...

item.title: World Cup drives surge in temporary and gig employment in Toronto and Vancouver
item.description: The upcoming FIFA World Cup in North America is expected to generate a wide range of temporary and gig work opportunities in its Canadian host cities, Toronto and Vancouver. The tournament, scheduled ...

item.title: Critique of Small Modular Nuclear Reactors as a Viable Energy Solution
item.description: The article argues that small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs), despite growing interest from governments, tech companies, and some environmental advocates, are unlikely to solve the core problems of n...

item.title: China coal mine explosion under investigation after at least 82 deaths
item.description: Authorities in China are investigating potential safety lapses following a deadly explosion at a coal mine that has killed at least 82 people, according to reports by The Associated Press. The inciden...

item.title: Debate intensifies over Labor’s proposed changes to capital gains tax and investor incentives
item.description: A senior Liberal frontbencher, Andrew Bragg, has called for stronger investor incentives rather than reductions, as the federal government faces mounting criticism over its proposed overhaul of capita...

item.title: Turkish police raid CHP headquarters amid escalating political dispute over party leadership
item.description: Turkish police raided the headquarters of the opposition Republican People’s Party (CHP) in Ankara after a days-long standoff between party supporters and a court-appointed leadership team. Riot polic...
